content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于12月15日08:00~12:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、无垢之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年12月29日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【命轮纪行：银霜纪行】
● 在 12 月 15 日 9:00 - 1 月 12 日 9:00 期间，命轮纪行「银霜纪行」限时开放！
    ○ 完成所有免费纪行任务累计可免费获得：「无垢之芯」×25、SSR 命轮「盒中童趣」×4。
    ○ 购买进阶纪行需要「源液」×980。购买后，完成所有进阶纪行任务累计可额外获得：「流明之芯」×25、SSR 命轮「盒中童趣」×12。
 
【复刻活动：泰旖丝】
● 在 12 月 15 日 9:00 - 1 月 12 日 9:00 期间，以下活动限时开放！
    ○ 「三相衡生」角色活动唤醒，活动期间可任意切换以下角色活动唤醒之一：
        ■ 角色活动唤醒复刻「目见母亲」：血肉界域辅助型唤醒体「泰旖丝」。
        ■ 角色活动唤醒复刻「花不染尘」：混沌界域防御型唤醒体「莉莉」。
        ■ 角色活动唤醒复刻「正位之刻」：深海界域伤害型唤醒体「图鲁」。
        ■ 以上唤醒体试玩活动同步开放。
    ○ 「因果苗圃」命轮活动唤醒，活动期间可任意切换以下命轮活动唤醒之一：
        ■ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「存续之理」：命轮「慈悲的哺育」。
        ■ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「纯白希望」：命轮「跨越疼痛」。
        ■ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「暗海迷声」：命轮「神王的颂歌」。
● 在 12 月 15 日 9:00 - 12 月 29 日 9:00 期间，玩法活动「欲海翻波」限时开放！
    ○ 攻略活动将有机会获得活动限定 SR 命轮「灼热的吻别」与活动限定头像「以银钥之名：泰旖丝」。
    ○ 活动期间唤醒体获得同调率翻倍，「繁衍狂热」开放进度要求放宽至通关「调查行动-忘却篇1-2」且无需同调率要求，同时消耗的「现实原点」数量要求也变为仅需 1 个。
 
【幻衣活动：泰旖丝·孽宴狂欲】
● 在 12 月 15 日 9:00 - 1 月 12 日 9:00 期间，幻衣活动「孽宴狂欲」限时开放！
    ○ 完成「调查行动-忘却篇」困难模式下的第一章至第七章，每章可获得：「银芯」×300。
    ○ 完成「调查行动-忘却篇-第七章」困难模式还可额外获得泰旖丝全新 1 ☆ 幻衣「孽宴狂欲」。
    ○ 活动结束后 1 ☆ 幻衣「泰旖丝·孽宴狂欲」将会上架「幻衣订购」商城，价格为「源液」×680 。
 
【学园活动：第 26 期】
● 在 12 月 15 日 9:00 - 12 月 29 日 9:00 期间，以下学园活动限时开放！
● 第 26 期「学园礼赠」
    ○ 活动期间累计登录 7 天即可领取「流明之芯」×10 的丰厚奖励！累计登录可获得其他奖励！
● 第 26 期「课题纪录」
    ○ 因本期课题持续时间较短，获得课题经验翻倍！
    ○ 本期核心课题·限定头像：「呆呆档案照：旺达」、「呆呆档案照：弥利亚姆」、「典藏邮票：朵尔」、「典藏邮票：熔毁·朵尔」、「永不褪色的昨天：希洛」、「永不褪色的昨天：血链·希洛」。
● 第 26 赛季「孽宴狂欲」
    ○ 本赛季·限定对战表情：「弥萨格假期：达芙黛尔·神秘」、「弥萨格假期：24·温柔」、「弥萨格假期：卡斯托尔·比拇指」、「弥萨格假期：波吕克斯·比心」。
 
二、综合
【幻梦深潜】
● 探索中现在可以看到当前的评分状态。
● 部分关卡地图有所调整，现在必须挑战的怪物数量差异会更小。
● 每周推荐的唤醒体现在会在「编队」和「选择唤醒体」界面有强化标记。
 
【一般】
● 「典藏馆」中「事件」界面右侧的金线装饰亮度有所降低，确保主要内容更引人注意。
● 「相位对弈-表情故事」中，不再包含不必要的获得途径描述。
● 部分唤醒体的战斗音效清晰度和打击感有所强化：泰旖丝、图鲁、莉莉、法洛思、墨菲、凯刻斯、戈利亚、珊、希莱斯特。
 
三、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了「中毒」、「死亡抵抗」、「献祭」、「旧日余烬」在部分情况下未正常触发的问题。
● 修复了「时序逆行」切换回合后可能会出现战斗无法结束的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「图鲁」释放狂气爆发特效表现不正确的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「卡茜亚」未拥有启灵3时，指令卡「隔空取物」有时能够触发余波效果的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「墨菲」的幻衣「糖果劫案」立绘局部动态效果不正确问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「克珀珊特」未拥有启灵1时，「打击」、「防御」有时能够错误触发余波效果的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」的指令卡「深海圣咏」在 1/3/5 级时，余波清除献祭数值效果错误与 2/4/6 级相同的问题，应以技能升级界面为准，为 2.5/3.5/4.5% 最大生命。
● 修复了钥令「不落的太阳」会错误抽取到「灵知觉醒」卡牌并错误赋予其「活焰」的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「无名之神的面纱」描述错误的问题，应为「在 1 回合内累计打出 4 张归属于不同唤醒体的指令卡」，而非「连续打出 4 张归属于不同唤醒体的指令卡」，实际效果不受影响。
● 修复了卡牌出现算力变化后，弃牌堆中的卡牌在点开详情界面后没有正确显示算力变化影响的问题。
● 修复了敌人「贴身管家」和「谕令神官」的意图「腐骨重击」错误缺少出血效果描述的问题，实际效果不变。
【相位对弈】
● 修复了「相位对弈」中对方牌库重置会错误地触发我方的牌库重置触发效果的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中未进入对决时挂后台，在对面投降后切回前台，进入战斗时一直显示重连中的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中「重逢心愿」在未变化的情况下能直接打出的问题。
 
【一般】
● 修复了异梦视界中「再见永无乡」、「再见，永无乡」战斗关卡达成 3 星后未能增却获得 3 星奖励的问题。对于修复前相关关卡已经达成 3 星的守密人，在更新后首次登录时将收到对应的奖励补发邮件。
● 修复了在包含剧情预设唤醒体的关卡中进行「调查」时，若队伍平均等级不足，点击「前往提升」会卡住的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒体」中相位对弈语音的解锁条件未能正确生效的问题，现在需要在「相位对弈」中触发过后才解锁，此前已经解锁的条目不受影响。
● 修复了「兑换码」中输入特殊字符会导致窗口自动关闭的问题。
● 修复了「守密人档案」中「点赞记录」、调查状况「无光之境」没有及时更新的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」中音乐解锁后收集数量没有实时更新的问题。
● 修复了「时间原点」选择回溯目标时滑动列表会错误导致选中目标改变的问题。
● 修复了「助战」中常用助战唤醒体没有正确优先展示的问题。
 
【显示】
● 修复了唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」调查完成界面中立绘显示不完整的问题。已完成
● 修复了「环行·拉蒙娜」幻衣的新提示未能在「拉蒙娜」唤醒体详情界面中展示的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒体」中获得新幻衣后提示样式不正确的问题。
● 修复了「校友会」和「助战」中查看唤醒体「血链·希洛」、「熔毁·朵尔」、「诞妄·墨菲」的详细信息时，展示立绘错误变为「环行·拉蒙娜」的问题。
● 修复了玩法活动「再战原初」战斗记录显示异常的问题。
● 修复了玩法活动「再战原初」部分界面细节错误的问题，例如选择关卡界面的文本没有深色边缘效果难以看清、关卡详情右上方的星辰篇标识错误遮挡文字等问题。
● 修复了「时间原点」回溯部分唤醒体后会错误出现无法消除的红点的问题。
● 修复了头像「典藏邮票：环行：拉蒙娜」名字错误的问题，应该为「典藏邮票：环行·拉蒙娜」。
 
【弥萨格商店】
● 在V2.4.0更新中，意外出现了 1 个 120 源液、包含 10 个流明之芯的「流明唤醒补给」礼盒。这会导致大家可能同时看到 2 个「流明唤醒补给」礼盒，但其中 1 个仅包含 5 个流明之芯。为了减少大家的混淆，我们在本次更新中下架了包含 5 个流明之芯的「流明唤醒补给」礼盒。
 
四、本地化
【英语】
● 唤醒体「环行·拉蒙娜」的「打击」中「回环」效果描述的翻译现在更清晰易读了，本修改不影响实际效果。
● 造物「被遗忘者之血」的效果描述翻译措辞现在更清晰易读了，本修改不影响实际效果。
● 修复了敌人「原初信徒」战斗中警告信息翻译错误的问题，正确措辞应为“被护盾格挡的触腕伤害会造成中毒”，本修改不影响实际效果。修复了调查行动、意识深潜、特遣记录、通讯器对话中共计 36 处措辞不统一或不自然的机器翻译。
● 修复了界面文本、道具描述中的 5 处错误拼写。
● 修复了「校友会」新增关注者界面中，「刚才关注您」的提示消息机器翻译错误的问题。

**V2.4.0.11 Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
Mythag University is scheduled to conduct campus facility maintenance from 08:00 to 12:00 on December 15(UTC+8).
You can enter the game once the maintenance is complete. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Server Maintenance Compensation: Silver×200, Pure Core×5
  
[Claim Conditions]
The collection period ends on December 29, 2025 at 09:00. Please remember to check your mailbox in time to collect the supplies.
 
[Update Content]
1. Event
[Wheel of Destiny: Silver Frost Archives]
● From December 15 at 9:00 AM to January 12 at 9:00 AM, the Wheel of Destiny event "Silver Frost Chronicles" is now available for a limited time!
○ Completing all free Chronicle tasks can earn you: "Pure Core" ×25, SSR Wheel of Destiny "Dear Papa Noel" ×4 for free.
○ Purchasing the Advanced Chronicle requires Silver Prime ×980. After purchase, completing all Advanced Chronicle tasks will grant an additional: Luminous Core ×25, SSR Wheel of Destiny "Dear Papa Noel" ×12.

[Reproduction Event: Thais]
From December 15 at 9:00 to January 12 at 9:00, the following events are available for a limited time!
○ "Triune Verdant" Character Event Awakening, during the event period you can switch to any of the following Character Event Awakenings:
■ Character Event Awakening Rerun "Ad Matrem Vocatus": Caro Realm Chorus Awakener "Thais".
■ Character Event Rerun "Unstained Blossom": Chaos Realm Warden "Lily".
■ Character Event Awakening Rerun "When Stars Align": Aequor Realm Assault Awakener "Tulu".
■ The above Awakener trial event is now open simultaneously.
○ "Sylvan Omen" WoD Event Awakening, during the event period you can switch to any of the following Wheel of Destiny Awakening options:
■ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Lex Ontis": Wheel of Destiny "Merciful Nurturing".
■ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Untainted Hope": Wheel of Destiny "Grace Through Pain".
■ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Dark Sea Whispers": Wheel of Destiny "Hymn of the Sovereign".
● From December 15 at 9:00 to December 29 at 9:00, the gameplay event "Carnal Desires" is now available for a limited time!
○ The strategy event will offer the chance to obtain the event-exclusive SR Wheel of Destiny "Kiss of Farewell" and the event-exclusive avatar "By the Silver Key: Thais".
○ During the event, Awakeners gain double Affinity, the progress requirement for "Reproduction Frenzy" is relaxed to clearing "Investigation - Faded Legacy Chapter 1-2" without any Affinity requirement, and the number of "Reality Points" consumed is also reduced to only 1.

[Awakener Outfit Event: Thais · Sinful Decadence]
● From December 15, 9:00 to January 12, 9:00, the limited-time skin event "Sinful Decadence" is now available!
○ Complete Chapters 1 to 7 of "Investigation - Faded Legacy" on Hard mode, earning: "Silver" ×300 per chapter.
○ Completing "Investigation - Faded Legacy - Chapter 7" on Hard mode also grants an additional new 1 ☆ outfit "Sinful Decadence" for Thais.
○ After the event ends, the outfit "Thais·Sinful Decadence" will be available in the "Garment Ordering" store, priced at "Silver Prime" ×680.

[Mythag Events: Issue 26]
From December 15 at 9:00 AM to December 29 at 9:00 AM, the following Mythag Events will be available for a limited time!
● The 26th Issue of "Gifts from Mythag"
Log in for a total of 7 days during the event to claim a generous reward of "Luminous Core" ×10! Other rewards can be obtained through cumulative logins!
● Curriculum #26
○ Due to the short duration of this topic, you will receive double Topic EXP!
○ This issue's Premium Topics · Exclusive Avatars: "Chibi Mug Shot: Wanda", "Chibi Mug Shot: Miryam", "Collector's Stamp: Doll", "Collector's Stamp: Doll: Inferno", "Unfading Yesterday: Helot", "Unfading Yesterday: Helot: Catena".
● Season 26 "Sinful Decadence"
○ This season's exclusive Traphase Emotes: "Mythag Holiday: Daffodil - Mysterious", "Mythag Holiday: 24 - Gentle", "Mythag Holiday: Castor - Thumbs Up", "Mythag Holiday: Pollux - Heart Gesture".

2. Summary
[Phantasmal Dive]
● You can now see the current rating status while exploring.
● Some stage maps have been adjusted, and the difference in the number of monsters that must be challenged will be smaller.
● The recommended Awakeners for each week will now have enhancement markers on the "Lineup" and "Select Awakener" interfaces.

[Normal]
● The brightness of the gold line decoration on the right side of the "Event" interface in the "Premium" has been reduced to ensure that the main content is more attention-grabbing.
● The "Traphase - Emote Stories" no longer includes unnecessary descriptions of acquisition methods.
● The clarity and impact of battle sound effects for some Awakeners have been enhanced: Thais, Tulu, Lily, Faros, Murphy, Caecus, Goliath, Sanga, Celeste.

3. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed the issue where "Poison", "Death Resistance", "Sacrifice", and "Ancient Embers" did not trigger properly in certain situations.
● Fixed the issue where the battle could not end after switching turns with "Time Reversal".
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect performance of the Exalt effect when the Awakener "Tulu" unleashes it.
● Fixed an issue where the Command Card "Telekinesis" could sometimes trigger the Aftershock effect when the Awakener "Casiah" did not have Enlighten 3.
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect partial dynamic effect of the illustration for the Awakener "Murphy" in the Phantom Garment "Candy Snatcher".
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Corposant" could incorrectly trigger the Aftershock effect for "Strike" and "Defence" when not having Enlightenment 1.
● Fixed the Command Card "Abyss Hymns" of the Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn" having the same Aftershock removal effect for Sacrifice values at levels 1/3/5 as levels 2/4/6; it should be based on the skill upgrade interface, which is 2.5/3.5/4.5% of Max HP.
● Fixed the issue where the Posse "Undying Sun" could incorrectly draw the "Rouse" card and erroneously grant it "Fiamma."
● Fixed the description error of the Astral Reign relic "Veil of the Nameless Deity", which should state "Play 4 Command Cards belonging to different Awakeners within 1 turn", instead of "Play 4 Command Cards belonging to different Awakeners consecutively". The actual effect remains unchanged.
● Fixed an issue where cards in the Discard Pile did not correctly display the Arithmetica changes after a card's Arithmetica was altered when viewing the details.
● Fixed the issue where the enemy's "Personal Butler" and "Divine Edict" intention "Rotten Blow" was missing the description of the Bleed effect, with the actual effect remaining unchanged.
[Traphase]
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the opponent's deck reset incorrectly triggered our deck reset effects.
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the game remained in the background when not in a duel, and after the opponent surrendered, it returned to the foreground, showing "Reconnecting" during the battle.
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where "Reunion's Wish" could be played directly without any changes.

[Normal]
● Fixed the issue where the rewards for achieving 3 stars in the battle stages of "See You, Neverland" and "Goodbye, Neverland" in the Dreamscape were not granted. Keepers who reached 3 stars in the relevant stages before the fix will receive a reissued reward email upon their first login after the update.
● Fixed the issue where clicking "Go to Upgrade" would freeze when conducting an "Investigation" in stages containing story preset Awakeners if the team's average level was insufficient.
● Fixed the issue where the unlock conditions for the "Awakener" voice lines in Traphase did not function correctly. Now, they will only unlock after being triggered in "Traphase," and previously unlocked entries will not be affected.
● Fixed the issue where entering special characters in the "redemption code" would cause the window to close automatically.
● Fixed the issue where the "Like Records" and investigation status "Lightless Realm" in the "Keeper's Archives" were not updated in a timely manner.
● Fixed the issue where the collection count did not update in real-time after unlocking music in the "Archive".
● Fixed the issue where the selection of the "Origin of Time" rewind target would incorrectly change the selected target due to scrolling in the list.
● Fixed the issue where the frequently used Support Awakener was not displayed correctly in "Support".

[Show]
● Fixed the issue of incomplete character illustration display in the investigation completion interface of Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn". Completed
● Fixed the issue where the new hint for "Ramona: Timeworn" outfit was not displayed in the details interface of the "Ramona" Awakener.
● Fixed the issue where the hint style was incorrect after acquiring a new outfit for the "Awakener".
● Fixed the issue in "Alumni Association" and "Assistance" where viewing the detailed information of the Awakener "Helot: Catena", "Doll: Inferno", and "Murphy: Fauxborn" displayed the avatar incorrectly as "Ramona: Timeworn".
● Fixed an issue where battle logs for the event "Against the Doom: II" were displayed incorrectly.
● Fixed issues with interface details in the gameplay event "Against the Doom: II," such as the text on the stage selection screen lacking a dark edge effect, making it hard to read, and the incorrect Astral Reign logo in the upper right corner of the stage details obscuring the text.
● Fixed the issue where an indelible red dot appeared after reversing some Awakeners at the "Origin of Time."
● Fixed the issue with the avatar name "Collector's Stamp: Ramona: Timeworn," which should be "Collector's Stamp: Ramona: Timeworn."

[Mythag Shop]
● In the V2.4.0 update, a "Luminous Pack" gift box containing 10 Luminous Cores and 120 Silver Prime unexpectedly appeared. This may cause everyone to see two "Luminous Pack" gift boxes at the same time, but one of them only contains 5 Luminous Cores. To reduce confusion, we have removed the "Luminous Pack" gift box containing 5 Luminous Cores in this update.

IV. Localization
[English]
● The description of the "Loop" effect in "Strike" for the Awakener "Ramona: Timeworn" is now clearer and more readable, and this modification does not affect the actual effect.
● The translation wording for the effect description of the Relic "Forsaken Blood" is now clearer and more readable, and this modification does not affect the actual effect.
● Fixed the translation error in the warning message during the enemy "Primordial Devoutee" battle. The correct wording should be "Tentacle DMG blocked by Shield will apply Poison." This modification does not affect the actual effect. Fixed a total of 36 instances of inconsistent or unnatural machine translations in Investigation, Deep Dive, Task Record, and Communicator dialogues.
● Fixed 5 spelling errors in the interface text and item descriptions.
● Fixed the issue with the machine translation error in the "Recently Followed You" message on the new followers interface of the "Alumni Association".
